textByHash.6bf913b19f194b9ce870dc3ebc4593e2b1126751: By remaining far away from this disease, I keep us all safer. Instead, my disciples act as my eyes, ears, and hands upon Gielinor. They are the harbingers of my will.
textByHash.7525a7130c22a6e7abc197b9871a17eb2bc31052: We share many common enemies, you and I. Enemies that infest Hallowvale like a disease.
textByHash.7ac6f99e5f5f06fbd9e1520b1ebb339d79166c04: Greetings my child. It is good that we are finally able to speak, for you have done a great service to me and my disciples.
textByHash.8f800300e2002cd6fa27c6696530af4c4667b959: No. For now, we must wait. But once again, you have my thanks. My disciple will ensure you are suitably rewarded. Know that you are now a friend of Sugadinti.
textByHash.aaa51f46add10df5e25581c98df6e9af2b01a1ad: She was an old foe. We will not weep for her demise.
textByHash.ce4cf1e8f18f166346c046d04e09887810d91096: A concerning development. However, you have gathered all that we need to overcome it when the time is right.
textByHash.f26750e1c788dbe7d46e9d928af7d1b4992e86fd: If that were possible, we would make it so. There are many constraints upon us. Still, these constraints are often to our benefit.
